params.name: subnets
params.label: VPC subnets IDs
params.description: Put at least 2 subnets IDs (not names). Check https://eksctl.io/usage/vpc-configuration/#use-existing-vpc-other-custom-configuration for constraints.

params.name: privateNetworking
params.label: Private networking
params.description: Makes the cluster nodes non-accessible from internet

params.name: privateSubnets
params.label: VPC private subnets IDs
params.description: Put at least 2 subnets IDs (not names). Check https://eksctl.io/usage/vpc-configuration/#use-existing-vpc-other-custom-configuration for constraints.

params.name: securityGroups
params.label: Security groups IDs
params.description: Additional security groups IDs (not names) for the nodes. Needed to give access to the node running DSS

params.name: controlPlaneSG
params.label: Control plane SG ID
params.description: Optional: Control Plane will be put in this SG. Must allow inbound access from DSS if you don't use the Shared SG

params.name: sharedSG
params.label: Shared SG ID
params.description: Optional: Control Plane, Nodes and VPC endpoints will be put in this SG. Should allow inbound access from DSS
